title: Dashboard kiosk mode — fullscreen PWA with no nav chrome
description:
Add an optional kiosk mode for the dashboard, designed for the wall-mounted tablet:
- Fullscreen layout with no sidebar, topbar, or mobile nav
- Accessed via a dedicated route (e.g., /dashboard/kiosk) or a toggle
- Screen-burn prevention: subtle animation or periodic content shift
- Clock/date display prominent
- Auto-return to dashboard if navigated away (optional)

This is an enhancement on top of the responsive dashboard work.

Acceptance criteria:
- Kiosk mode available via dedicated route or toggle
- No navigation chrome in kiosk mode
- Screen-burn prevention active
- PWA installable in kiosk configuration
